title: Arsenal sweat over key injuries before City showdown
excerpt: Arsenal head into a defining stretch with several core players missing training, raising questions around balance, control and match readiness before a major league clash.

title: Premier League injury list grows ahead of the run-in
excerpt: Managers across the league are dealing with absences and suspensions as the season tightens, making squad depth and rotation a major factor in coming fixtures.

title: Liverpool knocked out as Ekitike injury adds new concern
excerpt: Liverpool’s European exit has been compounded by a worrying injury setback, increasing pressure on the closing phase of the season.

title: Why late-season squad fitness is shaping title narratives
excerpt: Availability is becoming as important as tactics, with training absences and recovery timelines now heavily influencing match forecasts and expected game states.

title: Fixture changes continue to reshape April planning
excerpt: European commitments and calendar pressure are still affecting domestic scheduling, forcing clubs to adjust preparation windows and rotation strategy.

title: Big matches now hinge on depth, tempo and recovery
excerpt: At this stage of the season, the edge often comes from fresher legs, cleaner transitions and the ability to control rhythm across both halves.
